summary_text: Checked `draft` rows in live SoT `post_queue.json` only (no edits made), using `x-auto-post-guard` + `x-auto-contract` guardrails. 1. `3376b8c0-f0ac-8121-b157-edccb0ebe093` - Finding: `x.com/` URL is embedded in body `text`, but `source_url` is empty. This violates x-auto quote-post safety and source-grounding expectations. - Fix: move the quote link to `source_url` and remove all external URL text from body; keep body as abstracted commentary only. 2. `3376b8c0-f0ac-8120-b15a-eae094e3b658` - Finding: high commercial/operational sales tone with promotional architecture plus proper-noun spikes (`The Verge`, `Vertex AI`, `Bedrock`, `GSU`) and non-traceable numeric framing (`300%超`, etc.) in body. - Fix: abstract tooling names to category terms, remove hard-gain framing unless directly evidenced, and add only grounded, neutral claims. 3. `3376b8c0-f0ac-810b-9a95-f7b236435982` - Finding: direct marketing framing (`作業時間半減`, `診断ミス防ぎます`) and multiple unqualified quantitative claims tied to a single PR source, with brand/source-heavy wording. - Fix: replace with conditional language, retain only claims supported in the source URL, and neutralize brand/context references in publish-facing text. 4. `3376b8c0-f0ac-8196-b586-c63914540bc4` - Finding: operationally prescriptive/CTA style (`今すぐ始められます`) plus specific hard metrics (e.g., rate/accuracy claims, exact values) presented as settled fact. - Fix: weaken into governance-first framing and either cite verifiable quantitative provenance per sentence or remove concrete effect claims. 5. `3376b8c0-f0ac-81ce-ad7b-d5024c4a46ee` - Finding: includes `x.com`-class reference in body (`x.com/trq212/...`) while `source_url` points to another primary source; also includes many vendor/product nouns (`Anthropic`, `AWS Bedrock`, `Claude Sonnet`, `MCP`) and assertive migration claim (`移行が鉄板です`). - Fix: keep x.com in `source_url` only, remove non-essential brand handles from body, and rewrite to neutral risk-assessment style with evidence-backed wording. 6. `3376b8c0-f0ac-8121-b157-edccb0ebe093` (same row also flagged above) - Finding: heavy leakage pattern (`9割`, `誤診率15%減`, `信頼2倍`, `JAMA 2025` without grounded framing in the same row). - Fix: remove unverifiable precision language and convert to generic, conceptual statements; if retained, attach explicit line-level sources in `source_url`/metadata. Potentially non-blocking but worth aligning: - `3376b8c0-f0ac-8171-9ea1-e8bb62443cab` and `note`/`cursorvers`-sourced drafts still have strong branding-adjacent source provenance; if the user wants full abstraction mode, rewrite mentionable entities in text to generic operational terms while keeping source URLs in metadata only. Source checked: [post_queue.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/post_queue.json)
